item.dc:creator: satsukeshi

item.title: If you make a nostril sound you have to hit the green arrow thingy meme dump
item.description:
1. "F your shoes in particular" - CAT
2. That's some damn fine lawyer-ing
3
4. Economy Class? In this economy?!
5
6. Now we've done it!
7
8. Skaters gonna skate
9. Me in a fight
10
11
12
13
14
15. And finally I want to thank the 2 (Hi, Mom!) people that made it to end of the dump. I wanted to share with you that as well as browsing and posting on Imgur all day I'm also making a passion project of mine "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)" . If you liked the humor in this dump I think you will like the game too. It is inspired by "The Stanley Parable" and similar in tone and features funny signs like this one here. Can you imagine? A first person game mixed with humor? https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Anyway, It would mean the world to me and my brother if you checked the game out on Steam and gave it a wishlist. It won't disappoint. I promise. Just do not press the big red button, tho.
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Stephen Colbert dropping a harsh truth
item.dc:creator: peekitty

item.title: Fjord horse
item.description:
The Fjord or Norwegian Fjord Horse (Norwegian: fjordhest) is a relatively small but very strong horse breed from the mountainous regions of western Norway. It is an agile breed of light draught horse build. It is always dun in colour, with five variations in shade recognised in the breed standard. One of the world's oldest breeds, it has been used for hundreds of years as a farm horse in Norway, and in modern times is popular for its generally good temperament. It is used both as a harness horse and under saddle. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fjord_horse
#Fjord_horse #horse #norway #frozen #animals #nature
item.dc:creator: TongueTiedLabourerfromtheLandoftheLittlePeople

item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings, friends of the online variety
I’ve been attacked
attacked yet again
sad really
no need to brag
I’m still not convinced
one of life’s great mysteries
I want to see the wizard
my whole existence is flawed
mmm hmm
hope that person is ok
perfect time for a cig
check out the Mormon nerds in Utah
we’ve all been there
well we already have rum ham at least
obviously
finally a book for this
that’s all for me, have a great weekend gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Please help in Denver area
item.description: My niece is missing and I live half a country away. Thanks everyone. I appreciate you all. Also connected to the Parker area. Use these numbers, don't report sightings in the comments. Thank you. CBI missing persons (303) 239-4649 DPD non-emergengy line (720) 913-2000 Edit: she finally reached out to my sister in law and is safe and sound.

item.title: If you are unwilling to do your job, you can't get re-elected to that job.
item.description: tl;dr Ten R state legislators cannot run in Oregon - they walked out for six weeks and violated a constitutional amendment designed to stop walkouts Source: https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/2024/02/01/oregon-supreme-court-10-senators-reelection/
item.dc:creator: WebDragonG3

item.title: Less Punxsutawney Phil, more Concord Casimir
item.dc:creator: plinkey

item.title: Eyebleach for these trying times
item.description: Recently I had the privilege to work on a research mobile app to help with suicide prevention. Part of this includes a chat and we had to build in profanity filtering. This meant loading up a list of known swears, inuendos, and racial slurs...and my God. I needed to scrub my eyes after reading such lists! So here's a dump of eyebleach: cute animals, relaxing scenes, and altogether warm feelings to send you on your way! Part of the study works to confirm the statistics of social media interaction and the positive impact it can have on suicide prevention. The theory being: the more connected you are to peers, the greater sense of a belonging, and the lower the risk of self harm. That's what makes places like Imgur potentially great! We just need that social connection, and keep positive posts like this flowing in! And if you're finding yourself reflecting on thoughts of self harm, call 988 (in the US). They're trained professionals willing to talk to you. If you're looking for a quick chat from someone who will never judge, DM me! I'm always happy to learn about folks, your backgrounds, interests, and just how beautiful we can be as human beings.
item.dc:creator: IndianaCones

item.title: Welcome to Funny Friday! A humorous dump to end the workweek
item.description:
It's time for Funny Friday! As always when I do these dumps, there is a link in the comments to a private album with some bonus material, which I do just to make sure these posts don't get flagged mature for petty reasons, and out of respect for anyone browsing at work. Also in the comments is a quick thing if you want to be pinged when I make these posts, because I don't put them out every week. So if you want a notification when I do, please let me know.
... Aurora Borealis?
Peach has to be careful with Mario. He's delicate.
Now we know why they sounded so scared about the snake.
Truly an illustration of the duality of birds. (Peace really never is an option for the goose)
Any bets? I think the one thing that Spock and McCoy can agree on is how irritating Kirk can be.
Ironic that this was posted by The Shovel, since that tool won't do any good!
F1nn doesn't need a pet, he is the pet.
You have to be careful while crowdsurfing, the tide can pull you under.
I love the detail with the changes. Especially how all you need to do is rearrange letters to turn moe into emo.
George R.R. Martin said words are wind. I say you should break some.
You have to account for the momentum that hasn't been lost, Peter.
Yep, that's classic Caesar all right.
The Balrog is Imhotep, Pippin is Rachel Weisz's annoying brother, Aragorn is the Arab guy who was guarding the tomb, what else am I missing?
Probably giving away how much of an old man I am by including this.
That's a lot of... EMOTIONAL DAMAGE!
To be honest, I'd probably crack bad jokes like these at least a few times if I was original enough to come up with them.
It was in that moment that he knew... he fucked up.
The dog conditioned Pavlov well.
Some puns are so bad but I love them anyway.
Just in case the prior image didn't convince you I was telling the truth. (Also, I'd totally buy and wear this shirt)
Judging by the engineers I've known, this would be a good thing.
... yeah.
The lengths they have to go to get weebs to shower.
"Too old!" - Leo, probably
That's... that's not wrong...
Every time.
Every GODDAMN time! Can I get a little backup here, guys?
If they have a problem with the gay agenda, just wait until we get to the trans mission!
I wonder what her evil laugh will sound like.
He's a cunning linguist and had to shoot his shot. It was a good attempt.
I don't have a cat, so this lovely boy the the stars on his fur is the closest you get to a cat tax. Have a great weekend!
item.dc:creator: politicalwanderer
